page.content: In the Aquaculture Harvest Summary, the financial metrics for the years 2019 to 2024 reveal significant trends.

lines.text: In the Aquaculture Harvest Summary, the financial metrics for the years 2019 to 2024 reveal significant trends.

page.content: In 2019, the Revenue(CHF) was 100M, with a NetIncome(CHF) of 20M, CAPEX(CHF) at 5M, OPEX(CHF) of 10M, a ProfitMargin(%) of 20%, a HarvestVolume(Tons) of 2,000, and a MarketShare(%) of 15%.

lines.text: In 2019, the Revenue(CHF) was 100M, with a NetIncome(CHF) of 20M, CAPEX(CHF) at 5M, OPEX(CHF) of 10M, a
ProfitMargin(%) of 20%, a HarvestVolume(Tons) of 2,000, and a MarketShare(%) of 15%.

page.content: In 2020, the Revenue(CHF) increased to 110M, with a NetIncome(CHF) of 22M, CAPEX(CHF) at 6M, OPEX(CHF) of 11M, maintaining a ProfitMargin(%) of 20%, a HarvestVolume(Tons) of 2,200, and a MarketShare(%) of 16%. The year 2021 saw further growth with Revenue(CHF) reaching 120M, NetIncome(CHF) at 24M, CAPEX(CHF) of 7M, OPEX(CHF) at 12M, a ProfitMargin(%) of 22%, a HarvestVolume(Tons) of 2,400, and MarketShare(%) of 17%. In 2022, Revenue(CHF) was 130M, NetIncome(CHF) at 26M, CAPEX(CHF) of 8M, OPEX(CHF) at 13M, a ProfitMargin(%) of 24%, a HarvestVolume(Tons) of 2,600, and MarketShare(%) of 18%. In the Livestock production costs table for 2019, TotalCosts were CHF500K, CostperUnit CHF50, Fixed&VariableCosts CHF300K, FeedCosts CHF150K, LaborCosts CHF25K, ProductionEfficiency at 12.5%, and other metrics followed suit through 2024 with TotalCosts rising to CHF600K and CostperUnit at CHF60, reflecting an upward trend in production efficiency and costs.

lines.text: In 2020, the Revenue(CHF) increased to 110M, with a NetIncome(CHF) of 22M, CAPEX(CHF) at 6M, OPEX(CHF) of 11M,
maintaining a ProfitMargin(%) of 20%, a HarvestVolume(Tons) of 2,200, and a MarketShare(%) of 16%. The year 2021 saw
further growth with Revenue(CHF) reaching 120M, NetIncome(CHF) at 24M, CAPEX(CHF) of 7M, OPEX(CHF) at 12M, a

NetIncome(CHF) at 26M, CAPEX(CHF) of 8M, OPEX(CHF) at 13M, a ProfitMargin(%) of 24%, a HarvestVolume(Tons) of
